curation_notes: Patch commit 04091d3e identified from advisory references (direct commit link). The fix adds a recursion depth limit to the skip_field function in src/encoding.rs, which previously recursed without bound when decoding nested StartGroup wire types. Three non-test source files changed: src/encoding.rs (core fix adding ctx parameter and limit_reached check), src/types.rs (updated 10 merge_field callers to pass DecodeContext), and prost-derive/src/lib.rs (updated generated merge code). The primary vulnerable location is skip_field in src/encoding.rs — the sole recursive function lacking a depth guard. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern since skip_field is defined only once. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed: CWE-787 (Out-of-bounds Write) matches the stack overflow from unbounded recursion writing beyond allocated stack bounds.
